result:
Perfect! I have successfully completed all the required tasks:

## Summary

✅ **Project Updated**: Set fixed price of 374,900 kr on the "Datasikkerhet" project for Snøhetta AS
✅ **Invoice Created**: Created invoice for 75% of the fixed price (281,175 kr excluding VAT = 351,468.75 kr including 25% VAT)

**Details:**
- Project ID: 402052486 - Updated with fixed price of 374,900 kr
- Order ID: 402052562 - Created for the partial payment
- Order Line ID: 1607589097 - 75% of fixed price (281,175 kr excluding VAT)
- Invoice ID: 2147660246 - Final invoice for 351,468.75 kr including VAT
- Bank account updated with number 12345678903 to enable invoice creation

The invoice has been created as a partial payment representing 75% of the fixed price for the "Datasikkerhet" project. The project manager Jonas Larsen is already assigned to the project (Employee ID: 18712155).
